name: Curry Shui Mai
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Whole water chestnuts, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir all ingredients together very well.
2. Add curry powder and mix in thoroughly.
3. Fold into gyoza wrappers, placing about 1 tbsp of the filling in each. Leave the top open.
4. Serve as a traditional New Year's dish to ensure prosperity in the coming year. The Sun Luck brand gyoza wrappers are recommended as they are thinner than most.
5. Steam for 7 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through but not overcooked, as this can cause flavor loss.
